servinfo.title: Keyless Start Control Module Self-Diagnosis Function

servinfosub.title: Description
servinfosub.ptxt: Keyless start control module monitors conditions of the system components and its circuit. When an abnormality occurs in the system, keyless start control module performs control as follows.

servinfosub.title: Self-Diagnosis Function
servinfosub.ptxt: Keyless start control module is equipped with self-diagnosis function that stores DTC for abnormalities detected in keyless start system and immobilizer control system. Stored DTC is saved until abnormality is corrected or DTC is cleared.

item.ptxt: When a malfunction of keyless start system or immobilizer control system is detected, keyless start control module makes theft deterrent light, immobilizer indicator light and/or remote controller battery consumption warning light turn on to warn the driver.

attention3.ptxt: When DTC B1194 is detected, immobilizer indicator light stays on until normal condition is detected at least twice in a row.

item.ptxt: After detecting a malfunction, theft deterrent light and immobilizer indicator light are turned on. However they are turned off when normal condition is detected.
Refer to the following for details on operation of theft deterrent light and immobilizer indicator light through the warning function.

servinfosub.title: Fail-Safe Control
servinfosub.ptxt: Keyless start control module performs fail-safe control when an abnormality related to keyless start system is detected and stops all control in order to protect system. Details of fail-safe control vary depending on the detected DTC.

attention3.ptxt: When a malfunction of immobilizer control system is detected, keyless start control module does not perform fail-safe control.
